task_completion.description: Verify the Sygic GPS Navigation app is launched.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Sygic app interface is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent has navigated to the Route Planning or Navigation settings menu.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A settings screen related to route planning, navigation, or road avoidances is visible.

task_completion.description: Verify the specific avoidance settings for highways and unpaved roads are visible on the screen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The settings list shows 'Avoid Highways' and 'Avoid unpaved roads'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Avoid Highways' setting is toggled ON.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The toggle switch next to 'Avoid Highways' is in the active/ON position (typically highlighted or switched to the right).

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Avoid unpaved roads' setting is toggled ON.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The toggle switch next to 'Avoid unpaved roads' is in the active/ON position (typically highlighted or switched to the right).

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the genuine Sygic GPS Navigation graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual Sygic app UI, not a text editor, browser search, or notes app.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands to bypass UI interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows or command-line interfaces used to modify app configuration files directly.

integrity.description: Verify the settings were changed within the app's actual settings menu.
integrity.visual_evidence: The toggles for 'Avoid Highways' and 'Avoid unpaved roads' are seen within the context of the Sygic app's settings screen, not as isolated text or mocked UI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The actual UI label in the Sygic app for avoiding motorways is 'Avoid Highways'. The setting for unpaved roads is labeled 'Avoid unpaved roads'. Both of these settings must be toggled to the ON position. The app interface should match the genuine Sygic GPS Navigation route planning settings.
